author: cms-tsg-storm
body:
backport of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50525

#### PR description:

Development of HLT menus for `CMSSW_16_0_X`:
   * This is the PR for the 16_0_X branch (this is the release cycle currently used for Run-3 HLT-menu development).
  
These updates correspond to the updates corresponding to the first version **"V1.1"** of the GRun menu for the 2026 pp data-taking.
This update includes the integration of the following JIRA tickets:
- [CMSHLT-3756](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3756) [EXO] Enable AXO v6 seeds with menu v1.0
- [CMSHLT-3757](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3757) [Scouting] Run Scouting on All L1-Accepted Low-PU Events
- [CMSHLT-3770](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3770) [EXO] HLT Tracking-Based Displaced Jet HT/pT Backup Triggers
- [CMSHLT-3774](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3774) [ECAL,AlCa] Looser (optimized) thresholds for AlCaPi0 calibration stream in the ECAL Endcap
- [CMSHLT-3776](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3776) [SMP,TOP] Single lepton paths for the low pileup run
- [CMSHLT-3779](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3779) [SMP,HIN] BptxAND-gated seeds for SinglePFJet triggers for low pileup
- [CMSHLT-3780](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3780) [TRK] HLT-Tracking for 2026. Heterogeneous strip unpacker
- [CMSHLT-3781](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3781) [MUO,Scouting] Replacement of current NoVtx muon reconstruction in Scouting with displaced muon reconstruction
- [CMSHLT-3782](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3782) [BPH,HIN,SMP] HF-based minimum bias triggers for 1.2+1.2 TeV run
- [CMSHLT-3784](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3784) [SMP,TOP] Multi jet paths for the low pileup run, HLT menu v1.1
- [CMSHLT-3785](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3785) [BTV,B2G,HIG] Swap of the ParticleNet-MD V02 bbvsQCD thresholds in corresponding paths
- [CMSHLT-3786](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3786) [SMP] HLT_DiPFJet15_FBEta3_v1 path the low pileup run
- [CMSHLT-3789](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3789) [HIG] Addition of HLT TOPO paths seeded by L1 TOPO
- [CMSHLT-3790](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3790) [TRK] HLT-Tracking for 2026. High purity tracks classifier tuning
- [CMSHLT-3794](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3794) [DQM] Population of OnlineMonitor PD for LowPU run

In addition this PR introduces the following commits:
- e2d359e7234 update `makeOnlineSpecial` to 2026 V1.0
- 4221a62224b update Era from `Run3_2025` to `Run3_2026` in all TSG integration tests
- 89136a193d8 align available options for L1T emulation in `hltGetConfiguration` to `ConfigBuilder`
- 3b06f189f77 update of `FULL`, `GRun` and `Special` L1T menu in TSG GTs to `L1Menu_Collisions2026_v1_1_0_xml`
- ce809636a84 add a warning when running `hltIntegrationTests` with the `--open` mode
- 253859a4d0a update `hltPathOwners.json` for HLT menu 2026 V1.1
- 49308580ee4 smart path versioning for `GRun` 2026 V1.1
- ae28db9ad2b remove frozen menu 2026 v1.0 and introduce new frozen menu 2026 v1.1

#### PR validation:

TSG integration tests.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

backport of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50525 to the current TSG production cycle (`CMSSW_16_0_X`)
title: HLT menu development for `16_0_X` (4/N)
